$comment: SCBE benchmark score template. Copy per benchmark, fill every field. A number without this card is not publishable. See benchmarking-reference.md.

metric.name: <wall_time | ops_per_sec | pass@k | rmse | tokens | cost_usd>
metric.definition: <exactly what is measured, what is included/excluded from the timed region>

baseline.name: <what we compare against>
baseline.speedup_note: speedup = baseline.median / result.median; only quote if both cv_pct < 5

environment.env_hash: <hash of this block for leaderboard grouping>

notes: <anomalies, caveats, what was excluded, known noise sources>
